features.name: generate block with genvar for loop and nested always block
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a genvar for loop containing an always @(posedge) block with a nested regular for loop
features.snippet:
generate
  genvar i;
  for (i=0; i<2; i=i+1) begin
    always @(posedge clk) begin
      for (integer j=0; j<10; j=j+1) begin
        if (a[j])
          b[i][j] <= 1'b0;
      end
    end
  end
endgenerate

features.name: 2D unpacked array with dynamic genvar index access in generate
features.description: Code should include a two-dimensional unpacked array where the first dimension is indexed by a genvar from a generate loop

features.name: integer for loop nested inside generate always block
features.description: Code should include an integer-based for loop nested inside an always block that is inside a generate block
